summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish 155-mm self-propelled howitzer "AHS Krab" in Kharkiv region using an FPV drone with fiber-optic control. Ukrainian drone operators, including a female esports player now serving as an SVO UAV operator with the call sign "Tucha," have adapted gaming skills to real-world combat. Interceptor drones have become a key element of Ukraine's short-range air defense, successfully intercepting Russian UAVs and protecting critical infrastructure. Ukrainian forces repelled mechanized assaults on the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks with support from drone units. Meanwhile, Russian "Rubikon" Center operators conducted 88 strikes on Ukrainian positions in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction on March 7, 2026, targeting personnel and FPV anti-drone operations against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs.
